analysis_reports.title: #2 Overflow / Water Level Rise
analysis_reports.description: June rise of the Oder river. Elevated water levels causing flooding of floodplains west of Brzeg city center.

leak_data.title: Leak Analysis: #2 Overflow / Water Level Rise

analysis_reports.title: #3 Spring Rise Culmination
analysis_reports.description: Highest average MNDWI z-score in the entire period (+1.88). Culmination of a 2-week series of water level increases.

analysis_reports.title: #1 Overflow / Terrain Inundation + Erosion
analysis_reports.description: Heavy rainfall caused overflows of local watercourses in the Siechnice region. Water flooded fields and meadows, carrying washed-away soil sediments.

leak_data.title: Leak Analysis: #1 Overflow / Terrain Inundation + Erosion

analysis_reports.title: #4 Extensive Overflow — Floodplains
analysis_reports.description: Spring rise (May). Elevated water levels in the Oder basin cause flooding of floodplains. Anomaly scale indicates a widespread hydrological event.

analysis_reports.title: #1 May Overflow (Oder Rise)
analysis_reports.description: May rise of the Oder. Culmination of a 3-week series of water level increases. Flood wave reaches Opole from the upper Oder basin.

analysis_reports.title: #2 Second Flood Wave
analysis_reports.description: Second flood wave or prolonged elevated state after the first overflow. Water remains on floodplains for at least 5 days.

analysis_reports.title: #1 First Overflow Wave
analysis_reports.description: First flood wave reaches the 'Za Opolem' section. Water begins to cover floodplains south of Opole. Start of a 4-week period of elevated water levels.

analysis_reports.title: #2 Massive Overflow Culmination
analysis_reports.description: Culmination of the flood wave in the 'Za Opolem' region. Strongest anomaly across all monitored areas on this day. Widespread inundation of floodplains.

analysis_reports.title: #5 Simulation: Local Urban Overflow
analysis_reports.description: Simulation of a local urban flood (storm sewer backflow or levee breach). Highlights the need for high-resolution (1m) data in urban environments to distinguish water from wet concrete.

leak_data.title: Leak Analysis: #5 Simulation: Local Urban Overflow
